title: The Iliad enrollment registry — sub-systems created by implementations, maintained under the umbrella

authority.deferral_precedent: AM-40 (clotho/memory/CONTRACTS/package-roots.json — products deferred for conscious enrollment at the Iliad)

note: Each implementation creates a sub-system recorded here. An entry is 'delivered' only with its retrospective; entries created after the lifecycle protocol was instituted (post_protocol: true) must also carry their pre-review. The spine packages themselves are governed directly by TELOS authorization (plan/authz chain), not through this registry — enrollment covers sub-systems that implementations CREATE, plus the consciously-deferred products awaiting enrollment.

enrolled.name: institutional-memory-role-modules
enrolled.kind: governance-layer extension: role modules (daedalus, telos, argo) + capability modules (loadout, iliad) with executable verification
enrolled.pre_review_note: this delivery INSTITUTED the lifecycle protocol at its end; no pre-review existed to run — recorded honestly rather than backdated. Every subsequent enrollment is post_protocol: true and must carry one.
enrolled.maintained_by: The Iliad umbrella: lifecycle records live in this module; the sub-system's own oracles run in CI (institutional-memory job)

enrolled.name: clotho-slice-4b
enrolled.kind: Clotho Phase 1 slice: test/doc/ledger weavers with isolating oracles; D25/D31 + contracts flipped NORMATIVE
enrolled.created_by: PR #126 (harvest merge git:af64b88 of origin/clotho-task4b head git:15de463)
enrolled.maintained_by: The Iliad umbrella; oracles run in CI (clotho job: test-all incl. test-weaver-{test,doc,ledger}; institutional-memory job: record discipline)

enrolled.name: clotho-slice-5
enrolled.kind: Clotho Phase 1 slice: query surface + complete-weave driver + advisory invariant; first real-repository weave published
enrolled.maintained_by: The Iliad umbrella; oracles in CI (clotho test-all 13 incl. test-query/test-weave/test-advisory; institutional-memory job)

enrolled.name: clotho-slice-6
enrolled.kind: Clotho Phase 1 slice: flagship acceptance in npm test; the escalation-path proof; Eye-ruled reviewed data (obligation ledger + flagship run evidence)
enrolled.maintained_by: The Iliad umbrella; oracles in CI (clotho test-all 14 incl. test-flagship; institutional-memory job)

enrolled.name: clotho-slice-7-phase-1-closure
enrolled.kind: Clotho Phase 1 CLOSURE: docs current + self-weave reproduction evidence (fixed point proven); design substrate fully NORMATIVE
enrolled.created_by: PR #126 (integration 395c971 + evidence commit; agents 9571ff7/12394cc; workshop b38aaf4)
enrolled.maintained_by: The Iliad umbrella; oracles in CI (clotho 14 tests; institutional-memory job); the reproduction re-verifies from committed bytes via run.mjs --verify-committed

future_modules_registered_unimplemented.name: hermes
future_modules_registered_unimplemented.role_meaning: API management and inter-system communication: routing, contracts, translation, and delivery.

future_modules_registered_unimplemented.name: medusa
future_modules_registered_unimplemented.role_meaning: defensive edge enforcement; blocks or quarantines hostile and nonconforming traffic.

future_modules_registered_unimplemented.name: narcissus
future_modules_registered_unimplemented.role_meaning: production of full-rollout, award-standard front-ends for enrolled products through the reflection loop: iterative UI rendering and visual review, repeated until the surface is genuinely beautiful, distinctive, and functionally complete.

enrolled_as_package_roots_note: lachesis and atropos were built through the Iliad (pre-review -> daedalus -> argo) as zero-dep code capabilities and CONSCIOUSLY ENROLLED into clotho/memory/CONTRACTS/package-roots.json#package_roots (AM-40 conscious-enrollment). As spine code packages they are governed directly (per this registry's note) and woven into the graph; their quest records + retrospectives live in their own memory dirs. They are therefore no longer 'registered-unimplemented'.
future_modules_note: The entries still listed in future_modules_registered_unimplemented are registered myths with defined system responsibilities and NO role implementation (meanings VERBATIM from docs/mythological-vocabulary.md; verify-contracts parses the registry and cross-checks each). Lachesis and Atropos have left that list through conscious implementation and enrollment. Implementing a remaining role follows CHANGE-PROTOCOL + this lifecycle (pre-review -> enroll -> retrospective).
deferred_note: EXACTLY the AM-40 product exclusions (verify-contracts cross-checks this list against clotho/memory/CONTRACTS/package-roots.json#package_roots_exclude). Enrolling one requires a deliberate amendment — never absorption by proximity.
why: The umbrella needs a ledger of what it maintains. Without a registry, 'each implementation creates a sub-system' decays into untracked artifacts; with it, every sub-system has evidence, memory, a retrospective, and (going forward) a pre-review — and the verifier fails any entry that skips them.
change_rule: Appending an enrollment is the lifecycle operating. Removing or reclassifying one is retirement — Atropos discipline (supersession recorded, never erased), via CHANGE-PROTOCOL.

oracle.source_of_truth: this registry + the referenced records on disk
oracle.contract_equals_code: docs/institutional-memory/verify-contracts.mjs (per-entry: evidence exists, every memory_dir exists, delivered => retrospective exists with non-empty optimizations, post_protocol => pre_review exists; deferred list == AM-40 exclusions)
